profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Indonesian Tobacco Tbk manufactures and sells cigarettes and tobacco products in Indonesia. The company offers roll your own tobacco products comprising roll-your-own cigarettes, tingwe tobacco, and shag tobacco or selfrolled tobacco. It operates in Papua, Nusa Tenggara, Kalimantan, Sulawesi, Sumatera, Maluku, and Java. The company also exports its products to Malaysia, Singapore, Japan, and India. PT Indonesian Tobacco Tbk was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Malang, Indonesia.
